artifacts.compiled_prompt: The villa pool and its mirror-perfect reflection sits within a wide field of negative space and context, quality of light passing through foreground. Warm golden-hour light moves imperceptibly across still water; the air holds a silence that feels chosen, not empty. The camera holds completely locked at ankle height, just above the surface, not a millimeter of drift — the stillness itself becomes the statement, on a 35mm telephoto with medium depth of field preserving environmental context. Rule-of-thirds framing — subject anchored at the intersection, horizon dividing the frame with classical authority. Eye flow traces naturally from left to right — the reading direction lending the composition a forward momentum. The entire image feels like a held breath — suspended, completely peaceful, inevitable. Time has stopped cooperating with urgency. Cinematic, hyperrealistic, no text overlays. Wide-angle perspective (35mm), natural environmental relationship. f/2.8. Meditative pacing — single sustained move.

diagnostics.message: STATIC movement has a non-empty velocity curve — planner inconsistency, curve will be ignored
